mapper.select: SELECT users.login, users.password, users.email, users.surname, users.name, users.patronymic, users.birthday, roles.name AS role_name FROM users LEFT JOIN user_roles ON users.id = user_roles.user_id LEFT JOIN roles ON user_roles.role_id = roles.id ORDER BY users.login

SELECT users.login, users.password, users.email, users.surname, users.name, users.patronymic, users.birthday, roles.name AS role_name FROM users LEFT JOIN user_roles ON users.id = user_roles.user_id LEFT JOIN roles ON user_roles.role_id = roles.id WHERE users.login = #{login}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (login, password, email, surname, name, patronymic, birthday) VALUES ( #{login}, #{password}, #{email}, #{surname}, #{name}, #{patronymic}, #{birthday, jdbcType=DATE} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET login = #{newUser.login}, password = #{newUser.password}, email = #{newUser.email}, surname = #{newUser.surname}, name = #{newUser.name}, patronymic = #{newUser.patronymic}, birthday = #{newUser.birthday} WHERE login = #{oldLogin}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE login = #{login})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id) VALUES ( (SELECT id FROM users WHERE login = #{login}), (SELECT id FROM roles WHERE name = #{role}) )
